meaning: n.伦巴舞(由古巴黑人民间舞蹈发展而成的一种交际舞)vi.跳伦巴舞
examples: The 1940s and '50s were the golden age of the mambo, the rumba and the chachacha.
I like rumba and jitterbug very much.
After class he took in the music of the Cuban streets, the African-influenced rumba.
Cluster II 's virtual satellite consists of a quartet known as Salsa, Samba, Tango and Rumba.
